metadata.description: Golden Q&A pairs for Aria RAG evaluation

questions.question: What university did he attend for his Masters?
questions.expected_answer: The University of Texas at Dallas

questions.question: By what percentage did he accelerate use-case delivery at Community Dreams Foundation?
What LLM fine-tuning techniques did he use?
questions.expected_answer: LoRA, PEFT and QLoRA with Hugging Face and PyTorch

questions.question: What was his role at Tech Mahindra?
By what percentage did he improve first-contact resolution at Castus Info Solutions?
What accuracy gain did he achieve in the LLM fine-tuning pipeline project?
What is the capital of France?
questions.expected_answer: This information is not in the document

questions.question: Summarise his overall profile as an AI engineer
questions.expected_answer: AI Engineer with 4+ years experience in RAG architectures, agentic workflows, LLM evaluation, Azure and GCP cloud platforms
